heroImage: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(88, 66, 124, 0.88), rgba(139, 90, 43, 0.38)), radial-gradient(circle at 28% 20%, rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.22), transparent 36%), radial-gradient(circle at 72% 30%, rgba(176, 196, 222, 0.2), transparent 32%)

zh.title: 圜丘天坛·登封回响
zh.subtitle: 清晨风声最满，麻雀在阶石上轻跳，像踩着疏朗的韵脚。暮色铺过空旷坛面，世界安静得只剩下光线移动的声音。滑动中，听见古礼散去的空寂如何被草叶收留。

scenes.subtitle: 晨曦 / Rite at dawn
scenes.title: 晨光掠过坛面的第一道波纹
scenes.description: 日出前后，坛上少人，脚步与衣料声被白堉与夯土吸收，只剩风在阶沿回旋。远处偶有车流，像一条被压低的低频带，托住整个清晨。

hotspots.label: 坛面风场
hotspots.title: 坛面风场
hotspots.text: 圆形坛面几乎没有垂直遮挡，风的路径清晰可辨：掠过边缘时略急，抵达中心时变得绵软，像一层可被听见的薄毯。

hotspots.label: 城声抬高
hotspots.title: 城声抬高
hotspots.text: 站在坛上，城市噪声被距离磨成一片均匀的「底噪」，与坛场的安静形成对比，让人更清楚自己站在仪式空间之中。

scenes.subtitle: 午时 / Bell and drum
scenes.title: 钟鼓与踏步的同心圆
scenes.description: 礼乐想象中，钟鼓并非喧嚣，而是节拍的界碑。脚步沿阶上下，木石相接处轻响，和远处偶发的铃声叠在一起，形成缓慢推进的时间感。

hotspots.label: 钟鼓余音
hotspots.title: 钟鼓余音
hotspots.text: 钟声偏金属与延展，鼓声贴地而行；若在空旷坛面聆听，尾音会被拉得更长，仿佛一层层向外扩散的圆。

scenes.subtitle: 暮色 / Echo fades
scenes.title: 暮色里，坛场把声音交还城市
scenes.description: 日影斜长，坛缘的轮廓变柔和，风声与虫鸣重新占据中频。人声稀少时，土与石的吸声特性更明显，像整个空间轻轻收束了一天的余响。

hotspots.label: 暮色收声
hotspots.title: 暮色收声
hotspots.text: 光线变弱时，听觉往往更敏锐：远处车灯与广播变得模糊，近处脚步与呼吸更清晰——坛场在声音上完成了一次「收束」。

en.title: Circular Mound Altar: Steps Toward the Sky
en.subtitle: Open terraces thin the wind, lift the city into a distant hush, and let bells, drums, and footsteps trace concentric rings—measuring the audible distance between heaven and the human world.

scenes.subtitle: Dawn / Rite at dawn
scenes.title: First light ripples across the terrace
scenes.description: Around sunrise the terrace is nearly empty—footsteps and fabric rustle are swallowed by earth and chalky soil, while wind curls along the steps. Distant traffic sits low, like a held breath beneath the morning.

hotspots.label: Wind across the mound
hotspots.title: Wind across the mound
hotspots.text: With little vertical shelter, wind paths are legible: quicker at the rim, softer toward the center—like a thin audible blanket you can stand inside.

hotspots.label: City lifted away
hotspots.title: City lifted away
hotspots.text: From the terrace, urban noise blurs into a steady floor of sound, sharpening the quiet of the ritual ground and reminding you where you stand.

scenes.subtitle: Noon / Bell and drum
scenes.title: Bells, drums, and footsteps in rings
scenes.description: In the imagination of rite, bells and drums mark time rather than noise. Steps rise and fall; wood meets stone softly, overlapping with distant bells in slow procession.

hotspots.label: Bell and drum tails
hotspots.title: Bell and drum tails
hotspots.text: Bells carry metal and decay; drums hug the ground. On an open terrace their tails stretch wider, rippling outward in rings you can almost trace by ear.

scenes.subtitle: Dusk / Echo fades
scenes.title: At dusk the terrace returns sound to the city
scenes.description: Long shadows soften the rim; wind and insects reclaim the midrange. When voices thin out, earth and stone show their absorptive calm—closing the day’s last reverberance.

hotspots.label: Dusk draws sound in
hotspots.title: Dusk draws sound in
hotspots.text: As light weakens, hearing often sharpens: distant horns blur while nearby breath and steps clarify—the terrace acoustically gathers the day to a close.
